# Ridgeline Loop

- **Length:** 6.2 km loop
- **Gain:** ~320 m
- **Surface:** dirt, one scree traverse near the top

A meadow-and-ridge loop. The first meadow fenceline is the reliable spot for
[Eastern Bluebird](../species/birds/eastern-bluebird.md); the shaded north side
below the ridge fills with [trout lily](../species/plants/trout-lily.md) in
early May.

## Walks here

- [2026-05-02](../daily/2026-05-02.md)
- [2026-05-17](../daily/2026-05-17.md) (Quarry Overlook spur, in the rain)

See the [trail map overview](../maps/overview.md).
